request.query: Using these retrieved scoreboard frame(s), identify the exact end-of-third-quarter scoreboard state: team names, which side each team is on, each team's score, the period, and the game clock. Then compare that grounded state against the answer options: A. 55 to 40, Bristol Central leading.; B. 52 to 52, tied.; C. 55 to 40, East Catholic leading.; D. 64 to 32, Bristol Central leading.; E. 64 to 32, East Catholic leading. State whether any option exactly matches the visible scoreboard. If none matches, say so explicitly and name the grounded visible score and leader.
